identity.name: AVO JERSEYS
identity.mission: Premium football jerseys for true fans.

buttons.primary: bg-black text-white hover:bg-neutral-800 rounded-none px-8 py-3 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-black border-2 border-black hover:bg-neutral-100 rounded-none px-8 py-3 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider transition-all duration-300
buttons.accent: bg-[#CCFF00] text-black hover:bg-[#B3E600] rounded-none px-8 py-3 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] hover:shadow-none hover:translate-x-[2px] hover:translate-y-[2px] transition-all

cards.product: group relative bg-white dark:bg-neutral-900 overflow-hidden border border-neutral-100 dark:border-neutral-800 hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300
cards.category: relative overflow-hidden h-full w-full group cursor-pointer

inputs.default: bg-neutral-50 border border-neutral-200 focus:border-black focus:ring-1 focus:ring-black rounded-none px-4 py-3 outline-none transition-all

navbar.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-white/80 dark:bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-neutral-200/50 dark:border-neutral-800/50

instructions_to_main_agent.general: Build a premium, minimalist e-commerce site. Focus on high contrast, bold typography, and smooth interactions. Use the 'Barlow Condensed' font for all headings to give it that sports brand feel.

pages.home: Hero section with full-width image and bold CTA. Bento grid for categories (Club, National, Retro). Featured products carousel.
pages.catalog: Sidebar filters (Year, Team, League). Clean product grid. Hover on product card shows secondary image or 'Quick Add'.
pages.product_detail: Large gallery on left (sticky). Details on right. Size selector as pill buttons. 'Add to Cart' button must be prominent.
pages.cart: Minimalist table layout. Clear total. Checkout button prominent.
pages.admin: Dashboard with key metrics. Order list as cards or table. Status toggle.
pages.tracking: Simple input field for AWB. Timeline view for status.

functionality.currency: Implement a context provider for Currency (RON/EUR). 1 EUR = 5 RON. Toggle in Navbar.
functionality.filters: Client-side filtering for demo purposes if backend API is limited, otherwise pass params to API.
functionality.cart: Use local storage or context for cart state.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry and grid systems.
Use 'Barlow Condensed' for headings and 'Inter' for body.
Primary CTA buttons should be sharp (rounded-none) or pill-shaped, high contrast.
Implement dark mode support using Tailwind's 'dark:' prefix.
